regional_cost_note: Builders in New Plymouth typically charge $2,800–$4,000/m² for new builds. Renovation costs vary widely: kitchen and bathroom upgrades from $25,000, full home renovations from $80,000+. Taranaki's coastal conditions mean weathertightness and durable cladding are important considerations. Always get 3 quotes from Registered Master Builders.

businesses.name: Profound Group
businesses.known_for: Award-winning builder specialising in passive homes and high-performance new builds; 2018 Taranaki Master Builder of the Year in the million-dollar-plus category.

businesses.name: Gareth Collins Building
businesses.known_for: Family-run Registered Master Builder with multiple Taranaki House of the Year awards, specialising in high-quality custom new homes and renovations.

businesses.name: Hofmans Builders
businesses.known_for: Registered Master Builder and eHaus Taranaki partner; specialists in architectural and high-performance passive homes with over 20 years’ local experience.

businesses.name: Frontline Builders
businesses.known_for: 15-year New Plymouth builder led by LBP-registered director Wade, specialising in new builds and house-and-land packages across Taranaki.

businesses.name: Custom Construction
businesses.known_for: Registered Master Builder and NZ Green Building Council member offering design, build, and project management for custom homes across Taranaki since 2015.

businesses.name: Lifestyle Building & Construction
businesses.known_for: Award-winning builder focused on Taranaki coastal lifestyle homes; 2020 Registered Master Builders recognition for unique, high-quality designs.

businesses.name: Landmark Homes Taranaki
businesses.known_for: 2024 TIDA NZ Group Home Builder of the Year; design-and-build specialist offering house-and-land packages across Taranaki from their Devon Street showroom.

businesses.name: Fowler Homes New Plymouth
businesses.known_for: Locally owned franchise builder offering fixed-price new builds and house-and-land packages from their Bell Block showroom.

businesses.name: Platinum Homes Taranaki
businesses.known_for: Jim and Gloria Martin’s locally owned franchise offering a wide range of floor plans and house-and-land packages with over 20 years combined building experience.

businesses.name: GJ Gardner Homes Taranaki
businesses.known_for: NZ’s busiest home builder locally owned by Ostra Holdings; fixed-price contracts, design flexibility, and a track record of reliable delivery since 2006.
